title: Authoritative dataset metadata: the 16-column columns array (schema authority - never inferred from record keys) and rowsUpdatedAt (the ONLY official freshness signal; no per-record version column exists)
capture_method: live urllib GET by M2-T008 producer, anonymous request to the official NYC Open Data SODA endpoint, single KB-scale bounded request
